title: Here's why analyst Richard Bove thinks the return of ‘the Goldman Sachs of old' is the right move
text: While Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has drawn criticism from inside the bank and elsewhere for retreating from its consumer banking business, Odeon Capital banking analyst Richard Bove said the marquee investment bank may be better off without it.

title: Synchrony (SYF) & HABRI Join Forces to Boost Human-Animal Bond
text: Synchrony (SYF) is expected to promote HABRI's science-based education within CareCredit's extensive veterinary network.
